_provenance: schema-derived from R1 AC-5: /api/state must expose fleet_correlation_alert from read_fleet_alert(), not from bot_state. Active when dismissed_at_et is NULL; None when dismissed_at_et is set or row absent. No producer-computed values.
description: Expected /api/state fleet_correlation_alert field behaviour after migration to dedicated table

cases.label: alert_visible_when_dismissed_at_et_is_null
cases.note: read_fleet_alert() returns row with dismissed_at_et=NULL → /api/state must return the alert object

cases.label: alert_hidden_when_dismissed_at_et_is_set
cases.note: read_fleet_alert() returns row with dismissed_at_et non-NULL → /api/state must return None (dismissed)

cases.label: alert_hidden_when_no_row
cases.note: read_fleet_alert() returns None (empty table) → /api/state must return None
